---
title: "TFModisco"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Import Libraries
```{r}
library(readr)

```

# Load data
```{r}
Cortico_grouping_4_down <- read_csv("/Users/georgiagoddard/Downloads/grouping_4_down_modisco_results_named.csv")
Cortico_tfmodisco<- read_csv("/Users/georgiagoddard/Downloads/Cortico_modisco_results_named.csv")

Lacto_grouping_6_up <- read_csv("/Users/georgiagoddard/Downloads/grouping_6_up_modisco_results_named.csv")
Lacto_tfmodisco<- read_csv("/Users/georgiagoddard/Downloads/Lacto_modisco_results_named.csv")
```

# Downstream
```{r}


```
